summary: Delightful, high‑energy performance captured in an unidentified recording source.
review: One reviewer raves about a powerful, on‑the‑money show from start to finish, while another provides only a cryptic comment and gives the release a zero‑star rating. No concrete details are given about the tape’s source or sound quality, so the technical assessment remains uncertain.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong positive feedback on the performance (5‑star review) balanced by a zero‑star rating with no detail; lack of recording info keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not comment on soundboard, audience mix, clarity, or any audio issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No comments about set structure or pacing were provided.
